tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: They're dumping their work on me again, but arguing is too much hassle. I'll just finish it to get the grade and avoid the drama.

desires: Secure the full grade for this project by absorbing the teammate's work to avoid any interpersonal conflict or being labeled as 'unreliable'.

goals.description: Immediately complete teammate_A's portion of the project to secure a full grade and avoid confrontation.
goals.rationale: My 'avoidant' nature makes conflict with teammates unbearable, and my 'impulsive' trait drives me to take the easiest path to resolution right now (doing it myself) rather than negotiating. My 'achievement' value means getting the full grade is the only metric that matters; I will sacrifice my time to ensure the outcome is perfect without friction.

goals.description: Submit the combined project immediately after finishing.
goals.rationale: Once the work is done, I need to close the loop quickly to eliminate the stress of the deadline. Long-term consequences (like burnout or resentment) are discounted because my planning horizon is short.

goals.description: Ignore any potential future repercussions of taking over too much work.
goals.rationale: Thinking about how this sets a bad precedent for next semester is too far in the future. Right now, the goal is just survival and a good grade.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances 'achievement' by securing the full grade and eliminates immediate 'conflict' with teammate_A. I'm ignoring the long-term burnout risk (impulsive) because avoiding their request feels safer than negotiating right now.
